zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.Yardley Hastings, Hardingstone, Northamp: 英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II是Sir William de Brereton和Lady Margery de Thornton的兒子，出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可。他於1226年之前與Ada de Hastings在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh-hans.Yardley Hastings, Hardingstone, Northamp: 英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II是Sir William de Brereton和Lady Margery de Thornton的儿子，出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可。他于1226年之前与Ada de Hastings在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II was born in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England as the son of Sir William de Brereton and Lady Margery de Thornton. He married Ada de Hastings before 1226, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1250, in his hometown, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II est né à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir William de Brereton et Lady Margery de Thornton. Il a épousé Ada de Hastings avant 1226, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1250, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II wurde in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Sir William de Brereton und Lady Margery de Thornton geboren. Er hat vor 1226 in England Ada de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1250 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II è nato il nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England come figlio di Sir William de Brereton e Lady Margery de Thornton. Lui sposato Ada de Hastings prima del 1226, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1250, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: イギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィック
ja.Cheshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Yardley Hastings, Hardingstone, Northamp: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーン
ja.Barton, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアバートン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton IIはイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでSir William de BreretonとLady Margery de Thorntonの息子として生まれた。1226年以前にイギリスでAda de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II(은)는 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 Sir William de Brereton(와)과 Lady Margery de Thornton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1226년 이전 영국에서 Ada de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II nasceu em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir William de Brereton e Lady Margery de Thornton. Ele casou-se com Ada de Hastings antes 1226, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1250, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II родился в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir William de Brereton и Lady Margery de Thornton. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Hastings перед 1226 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1250 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph De Brereton II nació en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir William de Brereton y Lady Margery de Thornton. Se casó con Ada de Hastings antes de 1226, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1250, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
